sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27964" key="dolwniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολωνικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n27964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pertaining to a top-sail,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ξύλον εἰς τράπεζαν δολωνικήν</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2305" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2305</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> <date TEIform="date">(iii B. C.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
